task_completion.description: Navigate to the Quality application in Odoo
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo interface is visible in the browser, showing the Quality app dashboard or menu.

task_completion.description: Locate the specific quality alert in the list or kanban view
task_completion.visual_evidence: A list or kanban view of Quality Alerts is visible, and the alert titled 'Structural Crack - Desk Frame' can be seen among the items.

task_completion.description: Open the detailed form view of the target quality alert
task_completion.visual_evidence: The detailed form view for the 'Structural Crack - Desk Frame' quality alert is open and displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Trigger the PDF report generation for the alert
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Print' menu is opened and an option like 'Quality Alert' is clicked, or a browser download prompt/notification for a PDF file is visible.

task_completion.description: Save the generated PDF report to the Downloads directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window, terminal, or browser download history shows a PDF file (with 'Structural Crack' or 'Quality Alert' in its name) successfully saved in the '/home/ga/Downloads' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser to interact with Odoo rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Firefox browser open and navigating the Odoo web interface.

integrity.description: The agent actually downloaded the PDF from Odoo rather than creating a dummy file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's download manager or a save dialog is visible, indicating the file originated from the Odoo web application, rather than terminal commands like 'touch' or 'echo' being used to fake the file.

integrity.description: The downloaded file is a genuine PDF document.
integrity.visual_evidence: The downloaded file has a .pdf extension and/or a PDF document icon in the file manager or browser downloads list.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target quality alert is named 'Structural Crack - Desk Frame'. The PDF must be saved to the '/home/ga/Downloads' directory. The expected downloaded filename should contain the pattern 'Structural Crack', but 'Quality Alert' is also an acceptable fallback pattern.
